'''zajuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dead|dead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dead|dead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zajuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæjivith|zæjivith]] || [[word:zæjivij|zæjivij]] || [[word:zæjivish|zæjivish]] || [[word:zæjivi|zæjivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zajujuvuth|zajujuvuth]] || [[word:zajujuvuj|zajujuvuj]] || [[word:zajujuvush|zajujuvush]] || [[word:zajujuvu|zajujuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zajuvuth|zajuvuth]] || [[word:zajuvuj|zajuvuj]] || [[word:zajuvush|zajuvush]] || [[word:zajuvu|zajuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zajufvuth|zajufvuth]] || [[word:zajufvuj|zajufvuj]] || [[word:zajufvush|zajufvush]] || [[word:zajufvuf|zajufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zajuvuthu|zajuvuthu]] || [[word:zajuvuju|zajuvuju]] || [[word:zajuvushu|zajuvushu]] || [[word:zajuvuku|zajuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zajuvuth|zajuvuth]] || [[word:zajuvuj|zajuvuj]] || [[word:zajuvush|zajuvush]] || [[word:zajuvu|zajuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zajuvuthul|zajuvuthul]] || [[word:zajuvujul|zajuvujul]] || [[word:zajuvushul|zajuvushul]] || [[word:zajuvukul|zajuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zajuvuthuthu|zajuvuthuthu]] || [[word:zajuvujuju|zajuvujuju]] || [[word:zajuvushushu|zajuvushushu]] || [[word:zajuvuku|zajuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zajuvuthun|zajuvuthun]] || [[word:zajuvujun|zajuvujun]] || [[word:zajuvushun|zajuvushun]] || [[word:zajuvukun|zajuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zajuvuthuoro|zajuvuthuoro]] || [[word:zajuvujuoro|zajuvujuoro]] || [[word:zajuvushuoro|zajuvushuoro]] || [[word:zajuvukuoro|zajuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
